allow: PowerShell(git diff --stat HEAD -- src/main/java src/main/resources | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($jmx = Get-Content "D:\\Learning\\JMeter\\CDOC_UI.jmx" -Raw; $beanshell = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, '<BeanShell'\)\).Count; $jsr = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, '<JSR223'\)\).Count; $groovy = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, 'scriptLanguage">groovy'\)\).Count; $jsBeanshell = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, 'scriptLanguage">beanshell'\)\).Count; Write-Host "BeanShell elements: $beanshell"; Write-Host "JSR223 elements: $jsr"; Write-Host "JSR223 with Groovy: $groovy"; Write-Host "JSR223 with beanshell: $jsBeanshell")

PowerShell($jmx = Get-Content "D:\\Learning\\JMeter\\CDOC_UI.jmx" -Raw; $disabled = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, 'enabled="false"'\)\).Count; Write-Host "enabled=false elements: $disabled"; $txnControllers = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, '<TransactionController '\)\).Count; Write-Host "TransactionControllers: $txnControllers"; $extractors = \([regex]::Matches\($jmx, '<BoundaryExtractor |<RegexExtractor |<JSONPostProcessor '\)\).Count; Write-Host "Extractors total: $extractors")
